snapshot.scope: Manual review binds public/documentation surfaces, control manifests, verifier code and shared executable schemas; automated gates execute current implementation evidence separately.

reviewers.task: Pi v0.80.7 H1 semantic-kernel ownership and responsibility review
reviewers.independence: Development froze the exact 33-path H1 code/evidence candidate after upstream-source, runtime, responsibility, full service-inventory and package/distribution review. Planning changed only the existing 13 owner, dependency, acceptance, semantic and independent-review artifacts.

dimensions.summary: The Pi owner, Host reliability boundary, H1-H4 migration, service inventory and exact dependency source are discoverable from the existing architecture, Pi, Job, retrieval, quality, release and playbook owners.

All owners agree that Pi selects semantic work while Host enforces typed capability, authority, resources, durability, recovery, safe projection and deterministic commit; H1 removes only adapter shadow-kernel control and leaves H2-H4 open.

PIGE-PI-001 and E3.08 remain partial, bind exact upstream-source, no-Host-correction, native-result, parallel-read and responsibility evidence, and identify H2-H4 without promoting any Requirement, Exit or Phase.

The machine inventory covers 104 services and freezes five no-growth migration owners, responsibility deltas, custom-control metrics and duplicate-primitive review baselines without treating LOC as a compression target.
No new document is added: the invariant is defined in architecture/Pi owners and other documents carry only their Job, retrieval, quality, release, implementation and decision projections.

verification.evidence: The exact combined candidate passes documentation, decisions, independent review, traceability, contracts, dependencies, boundaries, no-telemetry, source-artifacts and documentation-leanness gates.

Focused 8 files/187 tests; full serial 121 passed/1 skipped files and 1,406 passed/1 skipped tests; root/desktop typecheck, build, contracts, runtime-boundary/responsibility/negative/import checks, real Electron, unified roundtrip, macOS arm64 package and copied distribution pass.

verification.command: npm run verify:dependencies && npm run verify:boundaries && npm run verify:traceability
verification.evidence: Exact Pi 0.80.7 pins/integrities, reviewed upstream fixture, sole semantic kernel, responsibility/no-growth inventory and semantic lock v3/1,229 pass with statuses unchanged.
LEN-001 through LEN-005 pass within the existing entry, trace and governed Markdown budgets.

coordination.taskTitle: Pi v0.80.7 upstream alignment and shadow-kernel removal
coordination.compatibility: H1 preserves product capability/authority/durability boundaries while delegating Agent loop, follow-up, tool lifecycle, parallel read-only execution and native result shape to exact upstream Pi 0.80.7.
coordination.acknowledgement: Planning bound only the existing 13 governed paths to Development identity 63bd9a4d/f6a5f80b/edd6d614; the 33 Development paths remain frozen and H2-H4 stay serialized open work.

nonBlockingRisks: H2 still owns AgentIngest/Home semantic-orchestrator removal; H3 owns unique Job reliability coordination; H4 owns retrieval.ask/retrieval_query retirement and threat-model-reviewed durable primitive convergence.
Legacy agent_ingest and retrieval_query remain recovery compatibility until their assigned migration phase and must receive no new records afterward.
The persisted-provider canary was not run because PIGE_MANUAL_ACCEPTANCE_USER_DATA was absent; no credential canary evidence is inferred.
Windows/Linux qualification remains deferred and unclaimed; Requirement, Exit and Phase statuses are unchanged.
Queued resident-first UI identity b699482 is excluded from this H1 bind.
